situational_context: Running comeback week 6: 8 runs completed since May 3 gap-break (was 2 runs at last digest May 14). Distance consolidated at 5+ km — runs #4-8: 5.01, 5.02, 3.78, 5.23, 5.56 km. VO2max running improved from 38.3 to 40.3 (+2.0). Primary modality remains ebike commuting (~38 km round trip on sur-site days). ACWR 1.34 — slightly above 1.3 threshold due to two solid runs (loads 27+26) in a 4-day window plus ebike commuting. HRV trending LOW 5+ consecutive days (weekly avg 33 vs 90d baseline 36.3); body battery depleted (1/8 days ≥50). Pattern consistent with functional overreaching — Run #8 showed improving cardiac efficiency (HR 138 avg at 5.56 km vs HR 140 at 5.23 km). Weight declining steadily: 102.62 kg (down 1.48 kg in 26 days). No new labs since Dec 2025. Comeback protocol active — holding at 5 km until ACWR and recovery markers improve.

recommendations.text: Hold running distance at 5 km — do not increase until ACWR returns below 1.3 and body battery shows ≥50 on 4+ of 7 days. Runs #9 and #10 both at 5 km Z2 with strict HR cap 135 bpm.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR < 1.3 by Jun 15; body battery ≥50 on 3+ days this week

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep quantity — HRV has been LOW for 5+ days with body battery consistently under 50. Target ≥7.5h nightly. Avoid screens after 22:00 on training-eve nights (Tue, Fri, Sat).
recommendations.measurable: Sleep 7d avg ≥7.3h by Jun 15; HRV weekly avg ≥35

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein to hit 150g target — current 7d avg is 132g, consistently below target. Focus on breakfast and dinner protein additions. Each 10g increase supports tendon remodeling during the running comeback.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR stays >1.3 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 1.34. Should resolve as high-load Run #7 (Jun 3, load 27) ages out of the 7-day window by Wed Jun 10

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if max <50 for 7+ consecutive days (currently 8 days sub-50 except Jun 2)
markers_to_watch.reason: Persistent depletion despite adequate sleep — cumulative fatigue from ebike commute + running
Sustained LOW since Jun 4; further decline would suggest inadequate recovery

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain lasting >24h after a run → skip next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance remains the limiting factor at 102.6 kg body weight
